calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jun-07-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Douglas Dukelow, Esq. for Plaintiffs: General Clark, et. al.
Order waiving live testimony in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant: Thomas Dee Engineering Co., Inc., as follows:
Balance on Interest dued $349.63
Costs $407.33, for a total of $756.96
Judgment signed in open court.
